name: GitHub
description: Repository management, file operations, and GitHub API integration
summary: MCP Server for the GitHub API, enabling file operations, repository management, search functionality, and more.

tools.name: create_or_update_file
tools.description: Create or update a single file in a repository

parameter.path: (string) Path where to create/update the file
parameter.branch: (string) Branch to create/update the file in
parameter.sha: (optional string) SHA of file being replaced (for updates)

tools.name: push_files
tools.description: Push multiple files in a single commit

parameter.files: (array) Files to push, each with `path` and `content`

tools.name: search_repositories
tools.description: Search for GitHub repositories

tools.name: create_repository
tools.description: Create a new GitHub repository

parameter.name: (string) Repository name
parameter.private: (optional boolean) Whether repo should be private

tools.name: get_file_contents
tools.description: Get contents of a file or directory

parameter.branch: (optional string) Branch to get contents from

tools.name: create_issue
tools.description: Create a new issue

tools.name: create_pull_request
tools.description: Create a new pull request

tools.name: fork_repository
tools.description: Fork a repository

tools.name: create_branch
tools.description: Create a new branch

parameter.from_branch: (optional string) Source branch (defaults to repo default)

tools.name: list_issues
tools.description: List and filter repository issues

tools.name: update_issue
tools.description: Update an existing issue

tools.name: add_issue_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to an issue

tools.name: search_code
tools.description: Search for code across GitHub repositories

parameter.q: (string) Search query using GitHub code search syntax

tools.name: search_issues
tools.description: Search for issues and pull requests

parameter.q: (string) Search query using GitHub issues search syntax
parameter.sort: (optional string) Sort field (comments, reactions, created, etc.)

tools.name: search_users
tools.description: Search for GitHub users

parameter.q: (string) Search query using GitHub users search syntax

tools.name: list_commits
tools.description: Gets commits of a branch in a repository

parameter.per_page: (optional string) number of record per page

tools.name: get_issue
tools.description: Gets the contents of an issue within a repository

tools.name: get_pull_request
tools.description: Get details of a specific pull request

tools.name: list_pull_requests
tools.description: List and filter repository pull requests

parameter.head: (optional string) Filter by head user/org and branch

tools.name: create_pull_request_review
tools.description: Create a review on a pull request

parameter.commit_id: (optional string) SHA of commit to review

tools.name: merge_pull_request
tools.description: Merge a pull request

parameter.commit_message: (optional string) Extra detail for merge commit

tools.name: get_pull_request_files
tools.description: Get the list of files changed in a pull request

tools.name: get_pull_request_status
tools.description: Get the combined status of all status checks for a pull request

tools.name: update_pull_request_branch
tools.description: Update a pull request branch with the latest changes from the base branch (equivalent to GitHub's 'Update branch' button)

parameter.expected_head_sha: (optional string) The expected SHA of the pull request's HEAD ref

tools.name: get_pull_request_comments
tools.description: Get the review comments on a pull request

tools.name: get_pull_request_reviews
tools.description: Get the reviews on a pull request
